what_it_does: This file is a ledger attachment record that links an attachment identifier to a provider-registry channel board item, storing metadata such as id, channel, attachment_type, target, and an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Target is a board:// URI pointing to item-f4c43898
Added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
standouts: Uses a board:// URI to reference target board item item-f4c43898
attachment_type board_items indicates a board-item linkage role
notes: A provider-registry channel attachment stub that points to board item item-f4c43898 and records when it was added.
questions: What semantic role does attachment_type board_items imply?
What content or state does the referenced board item item-f4c43898 hold?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated board_items attachment role matches the metadata stub; no discrepancy.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to record that a specific board item is attached to the provider-registry channel, creating a traceable link for later lookup or fusion.
novelty: The board:// URI target scheme and the board_items attachment_type are the distinctive elements.
contribution: Provides a precise, timestamped channel-to-board-item linkage that a fused system can keep for traceability of board items within the provider-registry channel.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-c4496d08 in the provider-registry channel referencing board item item-f4c43898 via a board:// URI, with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To register a board item as an attachment to the provider-registry channel for retrieval and correlation.
